systemStatus.headline: Tue Apr 28 7 AM run — Google Ads auth expired (re-login needed). Sling Apr 28 + Yelp Ads (live) refreshed. Toast Mon Apr 27 DPS not yet delivered (~7:40 AM PT).
systemStatus.detail: (1) Google Ads: Chrome session redirected to account chooser at ads.google.com — cookie expired. Email sent to Joal flagging which service needs re-login. Live scrape skipped, last email-sourced data preserved (Apr 23). (2) Yelp Ads: LIVE scrape OK — Apr 1–27 spend $810, 90.1k impressions, 1.1k page visits, 244 leads, $900 bonus fully used (expires Apr 30). (3) Sling Apr 28: parsed OK — 9 staff, 2 off, 9 shifts, 0 uncovered, 41.91 hrs, 0 OT. (4) Toast Mon Apr 27 DPS: NOT yet delivered at 7 AM run (expected ~7:38–7:40 AM PT). Toast Sun Apr 26 DPS arrived 4/27 7:39 AM PT but body remains HTML-only / unparseable via Gmail MCP. Last fully parsed Toast = Sat Apr 25: $5,479.75 net / 192 guests / 20.8% labor (carried from prior run). (5) TripAdvisor: no analytics email from analytics@hm2.tripadvisor.com in last 24h. (6) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.
